Defendants Notice Of Motion To Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens
Off Calendar Sep-25-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTs NATIONSTAR MORTGAGE LLC, U.S. BANK, N.A. AS TRUSTEE, SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST's Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens is GRANTED. No opposition filed. The action has been dismissed on August 4, 2017. MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT NATIONSTAR MORTGAGE LLC'S Motion To Have Requests For Admission Deemed Admitted By Plaintiff Linda S Catron, And Request For Monetary Sanctions is Off Calendar, dismissal on file. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not reported (D501)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-24-2017 Continued To Sep-19-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Self-represented Plaintiff Linda Catron appearing on her own behalf. The OSC is re-set to September 19, 2017 at 10:30 am, in Department 610. Judge: Teri L. Jackson; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings And Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar May-03-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Linda Catron (415-999-1933) Plaintiff/ opposing party in pro per.
No other appearances.

Hearing is held. The court inquires if plaintiff complied with the tentative ruling rule. Plaintiff informs the court of compliance. The Court admonishes Plaintiff re: obtaining counsel. Argued re: request for more time to obtain counsel. The court DENIES plaintiff's request. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT SPECIALIZED LOAN SERVICING LLC's Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported (D501)
